sections.description: Internal Kingdom tool for managing Sermons, Events, and Calendar views (with recurrence).
sections.changelog:
• Added All Events shortcode with support for past and upcoming events.
  • Added Elementor widget for All Events.
  • Added category filtering for the calendar shortcode and Elementor widget.
  • Added optional thumbnail display for Upcoming Events and All Events layouts.
  • Improved Event Single widget rendering and fixed incorrect event content in Elementor preview.
  • Fixed Elementor-built event content output and raw CSS showing in Event Single.
  • Improved calendar event loading and overall event display consistency.
